xray.samplingrule.RuleName.Docs: The name of the sampling rule. Specify a rule by either name or ARN, but not both. Used only when deleting a sampling rule. When creating or updating a sampling rule, use the `RuleName` or `RuleARN` properties within `SamplingRule` or `SamplingRuleUpdate`.

xray.samplingrule.SamplingRule.Docs: The sampling rule to be created.  Must be provided if creating a new sampling rule. Not valid when updating an existing sampling rule.

xray.samplingrule.SamplingRuleRecord.Docs: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

xray.samplingrule.SamplingRuleUpdate.Docs: A document specifying changes to a sampling rule's configuration.  Must be provided if updating an existing sampling rule. Not valid when creating a new sampling rule.  The `Version` of a sampling rule cannot be updated, and is not part of `SamplingRuleUpdate`.

xray.samplingrule.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
